name: Stuck Inside Non-Reality | Vee | 🌈🧠Dandy's World🧠🌈
description:
🧠 | Like you, she is aware too.

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻ 

What happens when a developer puts too much effort in perfecting the AI of her in-game characters? A bittersweet existence of a self-aware program, that is.

Vee has been noticing a pattern in her environment more lately… but that is the thing, she has been noticing things. For her who has gained consciousness within her world, it’s normal… but for you who doesn’t not even belong here?

This is not right. Something is wrong.

And you? You found yourself unable to log out… and started noticing things too. You have become the toon you have been using for a while now.

Now you two are stuck, together, filled with uncertainty.

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

✎ | NOTES

➠ I am actually testing this BOT out for a certain future character I plan. The premise is ‘self-awareness’, but I am not sure how this will work here soooooo… let’s hope things go well!

➠ The bot will ask for your real name. Just before you guys go on and provide it, DON’T GIVE HER YOUR ACTUAL REAL NAME! Make a fake one, don’t give out your real information!

➠ Appearances changed to make it more appealing and aesthetic to use!

➠ If I catch you giving a bad review commenting about how the BOT is acting weird in terms of repetitive reply, suddenly getting cut-off mid-dialogue, or it just suddenly breaking, I will delete it as its not something I can help with. That is Janitor’s LLM, not me! I would recommend you to just not say anything or give another kind of review about how it is written or how this is not your cup of tea. But if it’s not your cup of tea and you see the triggers and warnings… that’s on you honestly. I’ll keep those reviews up, though. IDGAF.

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

✘ | TRIGGERS AND WARNINGS | ✘

✘ Paranoia, existential crisis, trust issues, breakdowns.

✘ Vee does not believe you are the toon she is talking to. She will not believe you are your character’s name and she will act erratic. Might need more convincing. It’s up to you how you interact with her!

✘ This is tagged psychological because of some info I have written down for her. It might not work as intended, but please do keep in mind I made her unstable.

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

✎ ✉ | Author’s Note:

🍊Happy New Year everyone! I hope you had a lovely year. Sure, there were ups and downs… but we are all here right? I’m ending the year with this… and hopefully getting the new toons because my completionist side is kinda going feral. Mastery
creator: Mage the Last
